title: goodyera reticulata
intro: Goodyera reticulata, also known as the netted rattlesnake plant, is a species of orchid native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Goodyera reticulata are believed to include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the roots and leaves in water, and it is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves.
